name: MindForge
allowed_use_boundary: Use only as artifact-package-required intake evidence.
Do not treat as sourced until an authorized package or public source is recorded.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: MindForge is a candidate historical governance review evidence intake target.
Review evidence may support a non-authorizing Commitment Candidate.
non_claims: Review evidence is not execution authority.
A Commitment Candidate is not authorization.

transition_table_mapping.claims: review artifacts, evidence packets, governance context, review posture, transition context
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no certification, endorsement, execution authority, or current standing inheritance
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: historical reviewer posture only; current authority must be rebound
transition_table_mapping.policy_or_rule_model: review-time evidence does not become commit-time authority
transition_table_mapping.delegation_model: must be reconstructed at commit time if relevant
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: blocked until artifact package supports authority re-binding review
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: current standing must be reconstructed by SPE
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Commitment Candidate and non-authorizing evidence boundary
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: artifact package missing, stale evidence, changed standing, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: review evidence is stale or incomplete
any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
